tests.test_name: Stale frontend shows update modal when Analyze is clicked
tests.journey: A user with a stale frontend attempts to run an analysis and is blocked by an update-required modal prompting them to reload.

test_coverage_matrix.scenario: Stale frontend shows update modal when Analyze is clicked
test_coverage_matrix.given_context: User is on the Analyze page and the backend reports a version mismatch
test_coverage_matrix.when_action: User selects format 'bdd' and role 'QA Manager', uploads fixture 'bdd_sample.feature', and clicks Analyze
test_coverage_matrix.then_assertion: An update-required modal is displayed containing a reload button
